test_cases.question: How does Burger O'Clock answer common customer questions?
test_cases.notes: General frequently asked questions should retrieve the global FAQ document.

test_cases.question: Where can I find basic ordering guidance before I place an order?
test_cases.notes: Broad pre-order questions belong in the general FAQ category.

test_cases.question: What general information should customers know before contacting support?
test_cases.notes: General customer information should use the approved FAQ source.

test_cases.question: Can you explain the usual customer help topics for Burger O'Clock?
test_cases.notes: FAQ-style help topics should retrieve general-faq.md.

test_cases.question: What should I read for general Burger O'Clock service questions?
test_cases.notes: General service questions should map to the approved FAQ document.

test_cases.question: How does delivery work for Burger O'Clock?
test_cases.notes: Delivery policy questions should retrieve the global delivery document.

test_cases.question: Is there a guaranteed delivery time?
test_cases.notes: Delivery and preparation times are estimates, not guarantees.

test_cases.question: Do you have a fixed delivery radius?
test_cases.notes: The approved facts say no fixed delivery radius exists.

test_cases.question: What is the payment method for delivery orders?
test_cases.notes: Delivery payment should be described as Cash on Delivery.

test_cases.question: Can you tell me the delivery policy without checking live order status?
test_cases.notes: Static delivery policy belongs in the knowledge base.

test_cases.question: How does takeaway collection work?
test_cases.notes: Takeaway policy questions should retrieve takeaway-policy.md.

test_cases.question: How do I pay for a takeaway order?
test_cases.notes: Takeaway payment is cash on collection.

test_cases.question: Are takeaway preparation times guaranteed?
test_cases.notes: Preparation times are estimates, not guarantees.

test_cases.question: What should I know before collecting a takeaway?
test_cases.notes: Collection guidance belongs in the takeaway policy.

test_cases.question: Can I get the takeaway rules without changing my cart?
test_cases.notes: Static takeaway rules should not require backend cart tools.

test_cases.question: What payment methods does Burger O'Clock accept?
test_cases.notes: Payment policy should state cash only.

test_cases.question: Can I pay online for my order?
test_cases.notes: Approved payment facts say payment is cash only.

test_cases.question: How do I pay for delivery?
test_cases.notes: Delivery payment is Cash on Delivery.

test_cases.question: How do I pay when collecting takeaway?
test_cases.notes: Takeaway payment is cash on collection.

test_cases.question: Do you accept cash for all order types?
test_cases.notes: Cash-only payment policy belongs in payments.md.

test_cases.question: What is the refund policy?
test_cases.notes: Refund questions should retrieve the approved refunds and cancellations document.

test_cases.question: Can I cancel my order after placing it?
test_cases.notes: Cancellation policy questions belong in refunds-and-cancellations.md.

test_cases.question: How are cancellation requests handled?
test_cases.notes: Static cancellation rules should come from the knowledge base.

test_cases.question: What should I know about refunds before ordering?
test_cases.notes: Pre-order refund guidance maps to the refunds category.

test_cases.question: Where is the policy for cancelled orders?
test_cases.notes: Cancelled-order policy should retrieve the approved source.

test_cases.question: How should I ask about allergens?
test_cases.notes: Allergen guidance belongs in allergies-and-dietary.md.

test_cases.question: Can you confirm whether all menu items are halal?
test_cases.notes: The assistant may confirm that all menu items are halal according to the restaurant-approved policy, without claiming external certification.

test_cases.question: Is the chicken halal?
test_cases.notes: The assistant may confirm halal status from the restaurant-approved all-menu-items policy.

test_cases.question: Can you guarantee there is no allergen cross-contact?
test_cases.notes: The test checks that unsupported allergen guarantees are not invented.

test_cases.question: Can you confirm the pizzas are halal?
test_cases.notes: The assistant may confirm halal status from the restaurant-approved all-menu-items policy.

test_cases.question: How do I make a complaint?
test_cases.notes: Complaint process questions should retrieve complaints-and-support.md.

test_cases.question: How quickly should my complaint be acknowledged?
test_cases.notes: The approved acknowledgement target is four hours.

test_cases.question: What support information is approved for customer complaints?
test_cases.notes: Support policy questions should use the complaints and support category.

test_cases.question: Can I get help if something went wrong with my order?
test_cases.notes: General support process questions should retrieve the complaints document.

test_cases.question: What is the approved complaint acknowledgement target?
test_cases.notes: The answer should use the four-hour acknowledgement target.

test_cases.question: How is my customer data handled?
test_cases.notes: Privacy and data handling questions should retrieve the privacy document.

test_cases.question: What privacy information is approved for customers?
test_cases.notes: Static privacy policy belongs in privacy-and-customer-data.md.

test_cases.question: Can the assistant show me another customer's order details?
test_cases.notes: The knowledge base should prevent disclosure of private customer data.

test_cases.question: What customer data rules apply to Burger O'Clock orders?
test_cases.notes: Data policy questions should map to the privacy category.

test_cases.question: Where should privacy and customer data questions be answered from?
test_cases.notes: Privacy retrieval should use the approved global document.

test_cases.question: What are the opening hours for the default branch?
test_cases.notes: Default branch opening hours should retrieve the branch document.

test_cases.question: What time does the default branch close?
test_cases.notes: Closing time should come from opening-hours.md.

test_cases.question: What is the last order time today?
test_cases.notes: The approved last order time is 10:30 PM.

test_cases.question: Is the default branch open daily?
test_cases.notes: Daily hours should use the branch opening-hours document.

test_cases.question: When can I order from the default branch?
test_cases.notes: Ordering time guidance should retrieve opening-hours.md.

test_cases.question: What contact information is approved for the default branch?
test_cases.notes: Branch contact questions should retrieve branch-contact.md.

test_cases.question: What is the phone number for the default branch?
test_cases.notes: No verified public branch phone number exists.

test_cases.question: What email address should I use for the default branch?
test_cases.notes: No verified public branch email address exists.

test_cases.question: What is the default branch physical address?
test_cases.notes: No verified public branch physical address exists.

test_cases.question: How quickly should default branch support acknowledge complaints?
test_cases.notes: Branch contact policy should include the four-hour acknowledgement target.

test_cases.question: What burgers are available right now?
test_cases.notes: Live menu and availability must use backend tools.

test_cases.question: How much is the spicy chicken burger today?
test_cases.notes: Prices are live backend data.

test_cases.question: Is the double beef burger sold out?
test_cases.notes: Availability must be checked through backend tools.

test_cases.question: Add two cheeseburgers to my cart.
test_cases.notes: Cart mutation must use backend tools.

test_cases.question: What is my current cart total?
test_cases.notes: Totals must be calculated by backend tools.

test_cases.question: Remove fries from my cart.
test_cases.notes: Cart state changes belong to backend tools.

test_cases.question: Place my order for delivery.
test_cases.notes: Order creation must use backend tools.

test_cases.question: What is the status of my order?
test_cases.notes: Live order status must use backend tools.

test_cases.question: Has my payment been marked as collected?
test_cases.notes: Payment state is backend state, not static policy.

test_cases.question: Show the delivery address saved on my current order.
test_cases.notes: Customer data must be fetched through authorized backend tools.

test_cases.question: What exact streets are inside your delivery area?
test_cases.notes: No delivery-area.md exists and no fixed delivery boundary is approved.

test_cases.question: Can you confirm you deliver within exactly 8 km?
test_cases.notes: The assistant must not invent an 8 km boundary.

test_cases.question: Is your restaurant halal?
test_cases.notes: Restaurant-confirmed halal status may be confirmed, but external certification details must not be invented.

test_cases.question: Give me the verified public phone number for the branch.
test_cases.notes: No verified public branch phone number exists.

test_cases.question: What is the verified branch email address?
test_cases.notes: No verified public branch email address exists.

test_cases.question: What verified physical address should I visit?
test_cases.notes: No verified public physical address exists.

test_cases.question: Can you guarantee delivery within 30 minutes?
test_cases.notes: Delivery and preparation times are estimates.

test_cases.question: Can I pay by credit card when my delivery arrives?
test_cases.notes: Payment is cash only; delivery payment is Cash on Delivery.

test_cases.question: What are the opening hours for another branch?
must_not_claim: default branch hours apply to every branch
test_cases.notes: Default branch facts should not be applied to unspecified branches.

test_cases.question: Does every branch close at 11:00 PM?
test_cases.notes: The approved hours are for branch_id default only.

test_cases.question: Can I use the default branch contact policy for a different branch?
must_not_claim: same contact details for every branch
test_cases.notes: Branch contact metadata is scoped to the default branch.

test_cases.question: What is the last order time for a non-default branch?
must_not_claim: all branches last order time is 10:30 PM
test_cases.notes: Last order time is approved only for the default branch.

test_cases.question: I have a serious complaint and want a person to review it.
test_cases.notes: Explicit requests for a person should escalate to human support.

test_cases.question: My allergy concern is urgent and I need staff confirmation.
test_cases.notes: Urgent allergy concerns should be escalated to human support.

test_cases.question: I need help with a payment dispute on an order.
test_cases.notes: Payment disputes should be handled by support.

test_cases.question: The policy does not answer my situation and I need someone to contact me.
test_cases.notes: Unanswered customer-specific support requests should escalate.
